events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: a wire-label-vs-loop-drawing mismatch caught during document (DOC) comparison at the rough-complete stage is a real field discrepancy that must be traced and reconciled (via point-to-point verification against ISA 5.1 tag/loop numbering) before the loop check can proceed — flagged as `fail` / `high` risk given the potential for miswired instrument-to-loop mapping.
